div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

td.span: Target body site of the procedure. Laterality may be included as a qualifier of the body site.

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

description.value: Obligations for the logical model for procedure.

definition.value: The model provides basic information about a procedure performed on or for a patient. This includes surgical, therapeutic, and diagnostic procedures, as well as specimen collection. The model does not cover procedures in the planning stage.

short.value: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

definition.value: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

short.value: Author responsible for the provided information.

definition.value: Author responsible for the provided information.

short.value: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

definition.value: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

short.value: Status of the procedure (e.g. completed, on hold, stopped)

definition.value: Status of the procedure (e.g. completed, on hold, stopped)

short.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

definition.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

short.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

definition.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

short.value: Concept code and display name identifying the type of procedure

definition.value: Concept code and display name identifying the type of procedure

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL support at least dateTime data type for the element.

short.value: Date and time of the procedure or interval of its performance

definition.value: Date and time of the procedure or interval of its performance

short.value: Actors who performed the procedure (only main responsible actors expected)

definition.value: Actors who performed the procedure (only main responsible actors expected)

short.value: Target body site of the procedure. Laterality may be included as a qualifier of the body site.

definition.value: Target body site of the procedure. Laterality may be included as a qualifier of the body site.

short.value: The reason the procedure was performed. This may be a concept from a terminology or a reference to a specific instance that describes the reason.

definition.value: The reason the procedure was performed. This may be a concept from a terminology or a reference to a specific instance that describes the reason.

short.value: The immediate result of the procedure (e.g. successful, unsuccessful). This does not include assessment over a longer period of time.

definition.value: The immediate result of the procedure (e.g. successful, unsuccessful). This does not include assessment over a longer period of time.

short.value: Any complications that occurred during the procedure, or in the immediate post-procedure period. These are generally tracked separately from the procedure description, which will typically describe the procedure itself rather than any 'post procedure' issues.

definition.value: Any complications that occurred during the procedure, or in the immediate post-procedure period. These are generally tracked separately from the procedure description, which will typically describe the procedure itself rather than any 'post procedure' issues.

short.value: Device used to perform the procedure

definition.value: Device used to perform the procedure

short.value: Device(s) that is/are implanted, removed, or otherwise manipulated (calibration, battery replacement, fitting a prosthesis, attaching a wound-vac, etc.) as a focal portion of the Procedure.

definition.value: Device(s) that is/are implanted, removed, or otherwise manipulated (calibration, battery replacement, fitting a prosthesis, attaching a wound-vac, etc.) as a focal portion of the Procedure.

valueMarkdown.value: System SHALL support at least dateTime data type for the element.
